    Galia Expanse — Complete Crafted Items Encyclopedia¶

    In-universe descriptions for all crafted items in Star Atlas Galia Expanse. Generated from recipe cross-reference data (recipes_json_2026-02-23T13-39-32.json).

    Summary¶

    Category Items
    🌱 Organic Components 15
    💉 Organic Consumables 9
    ⚡ Essential Supplies (R4) 3
    🔧 Components 315
    🔩 Ingredients (Intermediate Assemblies) 149
    🤖 Drones 19
    🏠 Habitat Assets 21
    ⚔️ Ship Weapons 1200
    🛡️ Ship Components 765
    📡 Ship Modules 180
    🎯 Countermeasures 450
    🚀 Missiles 350
    🏗️ Buildings 412
    🪨 Basic Resources (Raw) 79
    🌿 Basic Organic Resources (Raw) 15
    Total 3982

    🌱 Organic Components¶

    15 unique items

    Adrenoline (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A rare neuro-active isolate, separated through quantum filtration techniques from Magmaroot, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Focus Booster, Alpha Strike Serum, Temporal Accelerant. Organic farms dedicated to its production are among the most heavily guarded facilities in the Expanse.

    Aquastim (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A reactive organic essence, its molecular chains stabilized through enzymatic catalysis, sourced from Tidal Kelp, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Shield Synchronizer. A single batch can sustain an entire production line of consumables for days.

    Ballistene (Tier 3, Rare, USTUR only)¶

    A crystallized bio-reagent precipitated from the cellular fluid of Aegis Barrier Cactus, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Kinetic Amplifier. Its synthesis was once thought impossible outside natural biological systems.

    Carapaxin (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A rare neuro-active isolate, separated through quantum filtration techniques from Ironshell Cactus, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Mineral Metabolizer. Organic farms dedicated to its production are among the most heavily guarded facilities in the Expanse.

    Chronolex (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A high-yield organic distillate fermented under controlled zero-gravity conditions from Temporal Flux Orchid, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Temporal Accelerant. Seasoned harvesters say you can feel its potency through your gloves during extraction.

    Cryostabilin (Tier 3, Rare, MUD only)¶

    A dark-hued organic tincture distilled through molecular sieves from Frostcore Bryophyte, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Mineral Metabolizer. Its discovery revolutionized the field of neo-pharmacology across all three factions.

    Fortisine (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A delicate organic molecule stabilized in suspension, originally derived from Bastion Agave, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Shield Synchronizer, Kinetic Amplifier. Its molecular structure has inspired entirely new branches of synthetic chemistry.

    Ignisol (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A luminescent bio-compound harvested under precise atmospheric conditions from Blazing Snapdragon, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Alpha Strike Serum. The scent alone — sharp, electric, unmistakable — tells an experienced chemist everything about its potency.

    Ionophore (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A crystallized bio-reagent precipitated from the cellular fluid of Electric Fern, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Alpha Strike Serum, Neural Harmonizer. Its synthesis was once thought impossible outside natural biological systems.

    Nocturine (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A bio-reactive compound whose glowing amber color indicates peak molecular activation, refined from Shadowmoss, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Reflex Enhancer, Phantom Protocol, Neural Harmonizer. Few compounds in the galaxy bridge the gap between biology and industry so elegantly.

    Phasmine (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A volatile organic distillate carefully isolated from the cellular matrix of Spectral Lichen, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Phantom Protocol. Its therapeutic potential has barely been scratched by current galactic science.

    Psyconine (Tier 3, Rare, ONI only)¶

    A reactive organic essence, its molecular chains stabilized through enzymatic catalysis, sourced from Mind Shade Fungus, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Neural Harmonizer. A single batch can sustain an entire production line of consumables for days.

    Thalassine (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A potent biomolecular extract, drawn through cold-press centrifugation from Bioluminous Algae, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Focus Booster, Temporal Accelerant. Harvesters risk hostile environments to secure even modest yields of this precious compound.

    Thermogenin (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A luminescent bio-compound harvested under precise atmospheric conditions from Pyroclast Energen, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Mineral Metabolizer. The scent alone — sharp, electric, unmistakable — tells an experienced chemist everything about its potency.

    Velocitene (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A rare neuro-active isolate, separated through quantum filtration techniques from Swiftvine, its volatile properties harnessed through careful processing. It is a key ingredient in the synthesis of Reflex Enhancer, Phantom Protocol. Organic farms dedicated to its production are among the most heavily guarded facilities in the Expanse.

    💉 Organic Consumables¶

    9 unique items

    Alpha Strike Serum (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    An advanced organic consumable synthesized from Ignisol, Adrenoline, and Ionophore, flooding the nervous system with combat-grade adrenaline analogues that sharpen reflexes and heighten offensive instinct to preternatural levels. Some commanders stockpile it for decisive moments — the kind of engagement where there's no second chance.

    Focus Booster (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    An advanced organic consumable synthesized from Adrenoline and Thalassine, sharpening cognitive function to razor-fine acuity, allowing users to perceive battlefield dynamics as though time itself has slowed. Combat after-action reports consistently distinguish between engagements where this was available and those where it wasn't.

    Kinetic Amplifier (Tier 3, Rare, USTUR only)¶

    An advanced organic consumable synthesized from Ballistene, Fortisine, and Adrenoline, amplifying the body's kinetic output, transforming ordinary strikes into devastating impacts that echo through armor plating. Its orange-tinged vial has become an iconic symbol of elite special operations across all three factions.

    Mineral Metabolizer (Tier 3, Rare, MUD only)¶

    An advanced organic consumable synthesized from Cryostabilin, Carapaxin, and Thermogenin, saturating bone and tissue with mineral-dense compounds that harden the body against impacts that would shatter unaugmented physiology. Its orange-tinged vial has become an iconic symbol of elite special operations across all three factions.

    Neural Harmonizer (Tier 3, Rare, ONI only)¶

    An advanced organic consumable synthesized from Psyconine, Nocturine, and Ionophore, harmonizing disparate neural pathways into a unified perception field, granting awareness that borders on prescience. Medical officers administer it with a mix of clinical precision and quiet awe at what the human body becomes.

    Phantom Protocol (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    An advanced organic consumable synthesized from Phasmine, Nocturine, and Velocitene, suppressing bio-electric signatures while accelerating synaptic response, rendering the user a ghost — nearly undetectable and impossibly fast. Its orange-tinged vial has become an iconic symbol of elite special operations across all three factions.

    Reflex Enhancer (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    An advanced organic consumable synthesized from Nocturine and Velocitene, overclocking the peripheral nervous system to achieve reaction speeds that make trained combatants look sluggish by comparison. Its orange-tinged vial has become an iconic symbol of elite special operations across all three factions.

    Shield Synchronizer (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    An advanced organic consumable synthesized from Fortisine and Aquastim, reinforcing cellular structure at the molecular level, weaving a biological armor that grants temporary resistance to kinetic trauma. The compound's half-life is precisely calibrated — long enough to be useful, short enough to avoid dependence.

    Temporal Accelerant (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    An advanced organic consumable synthesized from Chronolex, Adrenoline, and Thalassine, modulating the user's perception of time itself, compressing seconds into subjective minutes of crystalline awareness and calculated action. The compound's half-life is precisely calibrated — long enough to be useful, short enough to avoid dependence.

    ⚡ Essential Supplies (R4)¶

    3 unique items

    Ammunition (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Space-grade ballistic ammunition manufactured from Copper. Every kinetic weapon system across every ship class demands a steady supply. In the contested zones of Galia, ammunition is not merely a resource — it is the difference between sovereignty and surrender.

    Food (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Standard-issue rations produced from Biomass, providing essential nutrition for crew sustenance. The old spacer's saying holds true across every faction: 'A hungry crew is a mutinous crew.' Without food, no fleet holds together for long.

    Fuel (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Refined propulsion fuel synthesized from Hydrogen, the lifeblood of every vessel traversing Galia's star lanes. Without it, no ship moves, no station operates, and no fleet deploys. Control the fuel supply and you control the stars.

    🔧 Components¶

    315 unique items

    Abyssal Energy Core (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    A classified alloy whose exact composition is a closely guarded trade secret among the faction's top metallurgists, crafted from Abyssal Energy Crystals and Energy Crystal Matrix. It is a key component in the fabrication of Dodiline Matrix Processor, Dysprosium Processor, Dysprosium Shield Processor, and 2 other products. Sought after by manufacturers across all three factions for its reliability.

    Adaptive Utility Core (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A meticulously layered compound whose crystalline bonds were designed to channel enormous force without fracture, crafted from Living Metal Symbionts and Chisenic Processor. It is a key component in the fabrication of Beryllium Crystals Extractor, Dysprosium Ore Extractor, Fusion Catalyst Deposits Extractor, and 2 other products. Prized by master crafters who understand that excellence begins with materials.

    Advanced Defense Core (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A propulsion engineering component that converts raw energy into controlled thrust with minimal waste heat, crafted from Fusion Defense Matrix, Lunar Defense Network, and Dysprosium Shield. It is a key component in the fabrication of Titan Defense Network. Some claim its discovery was accidental — a happy byproduct of an unrelated weapons experiment.

    Advanced Sensor Grid (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Developed through decades of faction-funded research, this composite represents the bleeding edge of material science, crafted from Silver and Silicon Crystal. It is a key component in the fabrication of Ignisol Processor, Fortisine Processor, Velocitene Processor, and 2 other products. Recycling this component is almost as complex as fabricating it — every atom was placed with intent.

    Advanced Weapon Core (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    An exotic metamaterial that exhibits negative thermal expansion, maintaining dimensional stability across extreme temperature swings, crafted from Dysprosium and Rhodium Power Core. It is a key component in the fabrication of Fire Control Core. Its creation demands energy inputs that only large-scale orbital facilities can sustainably provide.

    Advanced Weapon Frame (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    Nano-engineered to specifications so exact that even a single misplaced atom would compromise its function, crafted from Dodiline Crystals and Iridium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Launch Control Core, Weapon Targeting Core. Sought after by manufacturers across all three factions for its reliability.

    Aerogel (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    Nano-engineered to specifications so exact that even a single misplaced atom would compromise its function, crafted from Nitrogen and Silica. It is a key component in the fabrication of Frostcore Bryophyte Extractor, Frostcore Bryophyte Farm, Cryo Formation Crystals Extractor, and 2 other products. Some claim its discovery was accidental — a happy byproduct of an unrelated weapons experiment.

    Alloy Frame (Tier 1, Common)¶

    This material's unique phase-transition properties allow it to absorb catastrophic impacts and redistribute the energy harmlessly, crafted from Iron and Tin. It is a key component in the fabrication of Oceanic Cultivation Hub, Oceanic Storage Hub, Oceanic Power Plant, and 2 other products. Scarcity of this component has, on more than one occasion, delayed entire fleet deployments.

    Aluminum (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A refined metallic element, smelted from raw Aluminum Ore in high-temperature orbital foundries, crafted from Aluminum Ore. It is a key component in the fabrication of Aluminum Ore Extractor, Boron Ore Extractor, Garnet Crystals Extractor, and 2 other products. Scarcity of this component has, on more than one occasion, delayed entire fleet deployments.

    Ammo Control Core (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    A superdense crystalline matrix whose internal geometry was computationally optimized over millions of simulation cycles, crafted from Tungsten Core and Vanadium Alloy. It is a key component in the fabrication of Ammunition Control Matrix. It hums faintly when exposed to strong magnetic fields, a quirk that helps inspectors verify authenticity.

    Assembly Control Matrix (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A quantum-bonded substrate whose lattice resonates at frequencies that amplify energy transfer, crafted from Living Metal Network, Quantum Interface Core, and Zirconium Control Hub. It is a key component in the fabrication of Beryllium Crystals Extractor, Fusion Catalyst Deposits Extractor, Living Metal Symbionts Extractor, and 2 other products. A single defective batch once caused a cascade failure in an orbital station — quality control is paramount.

    Barrier Material (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A propulsion engineering component that converts raw energy into controlled thrust with minimal waste heat, crafted from Silica and Iron. It is a key component in the fabrication of Energy Modulator Processor, Field Harmonizer Processor, Heat Sensor Processor, and 2 other products. Counterfeit versions flood black markets, but experienced engineers can always tell the difference.

    Base Structure (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A propulsion engineering component that converts raw energy into controlled thrust with minimal waste heat, crafted from Tin and Silicon Crystal. It is a key component in the fabrication of Oceanic Cultivation Hub, Oceanic Storage Hub, Storage Module, and 2 other products. Field repair crews carry this as standard issue — it's the duct tape of interstellar engineering.

    Beam Emitter (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A high-precision electronic assembly, its micro-etched pathways carrying data and power with near-zero signal loss, crafted from Ruby Crystals and Silver. It is a key component in the fabrication of Extraction Beam. Its creation demands energy inputs that only large-scale orbital facilities can sustainably provide.

    Beam Interface Core (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    Born in the plasma furnaces of deep-space refineries, this compound achieves structural tolerances measured in picometers, crafted from Platinum Grid, Signal Modulator, and Sapphire Crystals. It is a key component in the fabrication of Beam Control Interface. Scarcity of this component has, on more than one occasion, delayed entire fleet deployments.

    Beryllium Matrix (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A high-precision electronic assembly, its micro-etched pathways carrying data and power with near-zero signal loss, crafted from Beryllium Crystals and Utility Core. It is a key component in the fabrication of Beryllium Matrix Processor, EM Bio Core Processor, Fusion Defense Matrix Processor, and 2 other products. Its consistent performance across wildly different environments speaks to extraordinary engineering.

    Bio Stabilizer (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A propulsion engineering component that converts raw energy into controlled thrust with minimal waste heat, crafted from Lithium and Quartz Crystals. It is a key component in the fabrication of Oceanic Central Hub, Oceanic Cultivation Hub, Oceanic Processing Hub, and 2 other products. Scarcity of this component has, on more than one occasion, delayed entire fleet deployments.

    Bioluminescent Interface (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A radiation-hardened composite designed to maintain structural coherence even in the shadow of a supernova remnant, crafted from Living Metal Symbionts and Neural Interface. It is a key component in the fabrication of Utility Integration Core. Prized by master crafters who understand that excellence begins with materials.

    Blast Charges (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A propulsion engineering component that converts raw energy into controlled thrust with minimal waste heat, crafted from Tritium and Hydrogen. It is a key component in the fabrication of Explosive Payload Kit. Logistics AIs across the Expanse continuously recalculate optimal distribution routes for this commodity.

    Boron (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A refined metallic element, smelted from raw Boron Ore in high-temperature orbital foundries, crafted from Boron Ore. It is a key component in the fabrication of Argon Extractor, Fluorine Gas Extractor, Hafnium Ore Extractor, and 2 other products. Veteran mechanics can gauge its quality by weight alone — precision matters down to the microgram.

    Boron Composite (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    This material's unique phase-transition properties allow it to absorb catastrophic impacts and redistribute the energy harmlessly, crafted from Boron and Argon. It is a key component in the fabrication of Spectral Lichen Extractor, Spectral Lichen Farm, Bastion Agave Farm, and 2 other products. Sought after by manufacturers across all three factions for its reliability.

    Capacitor Matrix Core (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    A bio-synthetic hybrid material whose organic filaments self-repair under stress, extending operational lifespan indefinitely, crafted from Energy Crystal Matrix and Palladium Conductor. It is a key component in the fabrication of Frostcore Bryophyte Extractor, Frostcore Bryophyte Farm, Mind Shade Fungus Extractor, and 2 other products. A staple of industrial districts from the Core to the frontier.

    Capacity Control Core (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    Smelted from ores harvested across multiple star systems, blending elemental properties impossible to replicate from a single source, crafted from Zirconium Control Hub and Utility Matrix. It is a key component in the fabrication of Dysprosium Ore Extractor, Germanium Ore Extractor, Hicenium Crystals Extractor, and 2 other products. Shipyard foremen sleep easier knowing their supply manifest includes this item.

    Chisenic Processor (Tier 3, Rare, ONI only)¶

    A precision-cut crystalline assembly whose facets refract energy along calculated vectors, crafted from Raw Chisenic and Gold. It is a key component in the fabrication of Adaptive Utility Core, Processing Control Core, Scaling Interface, and 1 other products. It hums faintly when exposed to strong magnetic fields, a quirk that helps inspectors verify authenticity.

    Chromite (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A refined metallic element, smelted from raw Chromite Ore in high-temperature orbital foundries, crafted from Chromite Ore. It is a key component in the fabrication of Oceanic Central Hub, Oceanic Cultivation Hub, Oceanic Processing Hub, and 2 other products. Some claim its discovery was accidental — a happy byproduct of an unrelated weapons experiment.

    Climate Controller (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Synthesized at temperatures rivaling stellar corona, its molecular bonds are among the strongest ever achieved by galactic industry, crafted from Thermodyne and Argon. It is a key component in the fabrication of Ignisol Processor, Thalassine Processor, Phasmine Processor, and 2 other products. A single defective batch once caused a cascade failure in an orbital station — quality control is paramount.

    Command Module (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A quantum-bonded substrate whose lattice resonates at frequencies that amplify energy transfer, crafted from Processing Core and Monitoring Circuits. It is a key component in the fabrication of Utility Controller. Pirates have been known to raid freighters specifically targeting shipments of this component.

    Control Circuit (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A bio-synthetic hybrid material whose organic filaments self-repair under stress, extending operational lifespan indefinitely, crafted from Silicon Wafers and Copper Wire. It is a key component in the fabrication of Dispersal Gas Mix Processor, Explosive Compound Processor, Photon Emitters Processor, and 2 other products. Entire economies on frontier worlds revolve around the extraction of its raw materials.

    Control Interface (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A specialized atmospheric compound, pressurized and purified to exacting industrial standards, crafted from Quartz Crystals and Copper Wire. It is a key component in the fabrication of Industrial Control Matrix. Recycling this component is almost as complex as fabricating it — every atom was placed with intent.

    Control System Core (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    An advanced composite material engineered at the molecular level, its internal structure optimized for maximum energy throughput, crafted from Electromagnetic Resonator, Dodiline Matrix, and Em Quantum Core. It is a key component in the fabrication of Advanced Control Matrix. Logistics AIs across the Expanse continuously recalculate optimal distribution routes for this commodity.

    Coolant Circulator (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Born in the plasma furnaces of deep-space refineries, this compound achieves structural tolerances measured in picometers, crafted from Argon. It is a key component in the fabrication of Radiator Assembly. Without it, entire production lines would grind to a halt.

    Cooling Network Hub (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    A classified alloy whose exact composition is a closely guarded trade secret among the faction's top metallurgists, crafted from Propulsion Gas Mix and Cryogenic Core. It is a key component in the fabrication of Cooling Distribution Network. Scarcity of this component has, on more than one occasion, delayed entire fleet deployments.

    Coordination Matrix (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    A defensive systems component, engineered to absorb and redistribute kinetic and thermal energy, crafted from Utility Core, Gold Contacts, and Viscovite Crystals. It is a key component in the fabrication of Multi-System Coordinator. A single defective batch once caused a cascade failure in an orbital station — quality control is paramount.

    Copper (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A refined metallic element, smelted from raw Copper Ore in high-temperature orbital foundries, crafted from Copper Ore. It is a key component in the fabrication of Oceanic Central Hub, Oceanic Cultivation Hub, Oceanic Processing Hub, and 2 other products. Its reliability has made it the default choice in both military and civilian applications for generations.

    Copper Wire (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A precision-forged structural material, tempered under controlled gravitational fields to achieve superior tensile strength, crafted from Copper. It is a key component in the fabrication of Oceanic Crew Quarters, Storage Module, Tin Processor, and 2 other products. Without it, entire production lines would grind to a halt.

    Core Stabilizer (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A carefully synthesized chemical compound, its volatile reagents stabilized through proprietary processing techniques, crafted from Zinc and Silica. It is a key component in the fabrication of Explosive Compound Processor, Heat Sensor Processor, Tritium Processor, and 2 other products. Station markets list it among the top twenty most-traded industrial goods in the Expanse.

    Coupling Control Core (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    A high-precision electronic assembly, its micro-etched pathways carrying data and power with near-zero signal loss, crafted from Titanium Framework and Gold Contacts. It is a key component in the fabrication of Mind Shade Fungus Extractor, Mind Shade Fungus Farm, Emerald Crystals Extractor, and 2 other products. Its consistent performance across wildly different environments speaks to extraordinary engineering.

    Coupling Interface (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Its surface shimmers with an iridescent quality — a side effect of quantum interference patterns locked into its crystalline structure, crafted from Lithium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Neural Harmonizer Processor, Palladium Conductor Processor, Thermal Core Assembly Processor, and 2 other products. A staple of industrial districts from the Core to the frontier.

    Cryogenic Catalyst (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Refined through a centrifugal distillation process that separates isotopes to achieve unprecedented elemental purity, crafted from Hydrogen and Krypton. It is a key component in the fabrication of Superchill Payload Kit. The characteristic blue spark it emits during installation tells an engineer the connection is good.

    Cryogenic Core (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    A versatile manufactured component, ubiquitous in workshops and shipyards across the Galia Expanse, crafted from Cryo Formation Crystals. It is a key component in the fabrication of Cooling Network Hub, Life Support Hub, Thermal Core Assembly, and 1 other products. Its creation demands energy inputs that only large-scale orbital facilities can sustainably provide.

    Crystal Lattice MUD (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    Forged in orbital foundries above gas giants, this material achieves purity levels impossible under planetary gravity, crafted from Diamond and Hydrogen. It serves as a terminal crafting product, valued for its refined properties in the galactic economy. Counterfeit versions flood black markets, but experienced engineers can always tell the difference.

    Crystal Lattice ONI (Tier 3, Rare)¶

It is a key component in the fabrication of Dodiline Crystals Extractor, Iridium Ore Extractor, Rhodium Ore Extractor, and 2 other products. Its quality determines the performance ceiling of everything built from it.

    Iridium Armor Plating (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    Smelted from ores harvested across multiple star systems, blending elemental properties impossible to replicate from a single source, crafted from Iridium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Dodiline Crystals Extractor, Defense Coordination Core. Station markets list it among the top twenty most-traded industrial goods in the Expanse.

    Iron (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A refined metallic element, smelted from raw Iron Ore in high-temperature orbital foundries, crafted from Iron Ore. It is a key component in the fabrication of Field Harmonizer Processor, Ironshell Cactus Extractor, Ironshell Cactus Farm, and 2 other products. A single defective batch once caused a cascade failure in an orbital station — quality control is paramount.

    Jasphorus Propulsion Core (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    An industrial-grade engineering component, built to channel immense pressures and temperatures without failure, crafted from Jasphorus Crystals and Phase Drive Core. It is a key component in the fabrication of Drive Assembly Core. Field repair crews carry this as standard issue — it's the duct tape of interstellar engineering.

    Jasphorus Weapon Matrix (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A classified alloy whose exact composition is a closely guarded trade secret among the faction's top metallurgists, crafted from Jasphorus Crystals and Em Weapon Interface. It is a key component in the fabrication of Weapon Synchronization Matrix. Every major starport maintains strategic reserves, knowing that shortages can cripple entire fleets.

    Joint Connectors (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Precision-cast in vacuum chambers to eliminate microscopic impurities, this material sets the standard for industrial excellence, crafted from Tin and Rhenium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Shield Generator Processor, Reinforcement Matrix, Structural Framework. Some claim its discovery was accidental — a happy byproduct of an unrelated weapons experiment.

    Kinetic Beryllium Core (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Precision-cast in vacuum chambers to eliminate microscopic impurities, this material sets the standard for industrial excellence, crafted from Beryllium Crystals and Titanium Framework. It is a key component in the fabrication of Beryllium Crystals Extractor, Strontium Crystals Extractor, Titan Scale Framework. Counterfeit versions flood black markets, but experienced engineers can always tell the difference.

    Kinetic Force Matrix (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    Smelted from ores harvested across multiple star systems, blending elemental properties impossible to replicate from a single source, crafted from Hicenium Crystals and Iridium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Strontium Kinetic Matrix, Structural Control Array. Scarcity of this component has, on more than one occasion, delayed entire fleet deployments.

    Kinetic Projectiles (Tier 1, Common)¶

    An exotic metamaterial that exhibits negative thermal expansion, maintaining dimensional stability across extreme temperature swings, crafted from Chromite and Iron. It is a key component in the fabrication of Kinetic Payload Kit. It hums faintly when exposed to strong magnetic fields, a quirk that helps inspectors verify authenticity.

    Kinetic Resonance Core (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A propulsion engineering component that converts raw energy into controlled thrust with minimal waste heat, crafted from Strontium Crystals and Vanadium Alloy. It is a key component in the fabrication of Resonium Ore Extractor, Titan Scale Framework. Recycling this component is almost as complex as fabricating it — every atom was placed with intent.

    Kinetic Stabilizer (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A meticulously layered compound whose crystalline bonds were designed to channel enormous force without fracture, crafted from Chromite and Zinc. It is a key component in the fabrication of Oceanic Extraction Hub, Explosive Compound Processor, Field Harmonizer Processor, and 2 other products. Trade convoys carrying this material are often assigned military escort — it's that valuable.

    Kinetic Stabilizer Core (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    Nano-engineered to specifications so exact that even a single misplaced atom would compromise its function, crafted from Iridium and Zirconium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Germanium Ore Extractor, Rhodium Ore Extractor, Kinetic Support Matrix. Indispensable to the supply chains that keep Galia's economy turning.

    Kinetic Support Matrix (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    An advanced composite material engineered at the molecular level, its internal structure optimized for maximum energy throughput, crafted from Hicenium Lattice and Kinetic Stabilizer Core. It is a key component in the fabrication of Hicenium Crystals Extractor, Zirconium Ore Extractor, Megastructure Support System. The characteristic blue spark it emits during installation tells an engineer the connection is good.

    Launch Control Core (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    A precision-forged structural material, tempered under controlled gravitational fields to achieve superior tensile strength, crafted from Advanced Weapon Frame and Rhodium Weapon Matrix. It is a key component in the fabrication of Dodiline Crystals Extractor, Iridium Ore Extractor, Launch Platform Core, and 1 other products. Shipyard foremen sleep easier knowing their supply manifest includes this item.

    Launch Platform Core (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Precision-cast in vacuum chambers to eliminate microscopic impurities, this material sets the standard for industrial excellence, crafted from Weapon Synchronization Matrix, Fire Control Core, Launch Control Core, and Weapon Targeting Core. It is a key component in the fabrication of Titan Launch Platform. Its market value fluctuates with the tides of war and commerce alike.

First synthesized during the colonization era, its formula has been refined but never fundamentally changed.

    An exotic metamaterial that exhibits negative thermal expansion, maintaining dimensional stability across extreme temperature swings, crafted from Iron and Neodymium Magnets.     A biomedical engineering product, synthesized under sterile conditions for safe biological integration, crafted from Iron. It serves as a terminal crafting product, valued for its refined properties in the galactic economy. A single defective batch once caused a cascade failure in an orbital station — quality control is paramount.

    Repair Protocol (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A precision-cut crystalline assembly whose facets refract energy along calculated vectors, crafted from Silicon Crystal and Tritium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Repair Nanobots. A single defective batch once caused a cascade failure in an orbital station — quality control is paramount.

    Replication Catalyst (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Precision-cast in vacuum chambers to eliminate microscopic impurities, this material sets the standard for industrial excellence, crafted from Biomass and Silicon Crystal. It is a key component in the fabrication of Gray Goo Payload Kit. Field repair crews carry this as standard issue — it's the duct tape of interstellar engineering.

    Resin Sealant (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    This material's unique phase-transition properties allow it to absorb catastrophic impacts and redistribute the energy harmlessly, crafted from Thermodyne. It is a key component in the fabrication of Access Control. Station markets list it among the top twenty most-traded industrial goods in the Expanse.

    Resistive Coils (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A superdense crystalline matrix whose internal geometry was computationally optimized over millions of simulation cycles, crafted from Carbon and Rhenium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Heating Element. Entire economies on frontier worlds revolve around the extraction of its raw materials.

    Resonance Utility Matrix (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A precision-cut crystalline assembly whose facets refract energy along calculated vectors, crafted from Lunar Echo Crystals and Gold Contacts. It is a key component in the fabrication of Beryllium Matrix Processor, Quantum Drive Matrix Processor, Quantum Interface Core Processor, and 2 other products. First synthesized during the colonization era, its formula has been refined but never fundamentally changed.

    Resonium (Tier 5, Legendary, MUD only)¶

    A refined metallic element, smelted from raw Resonium Ore in high-temperature orbital foundries, crafted from Resonium Ore. It is a key component in the fabrication of Resonium Kinetic Core, Resonium Utility Matrix. Counterfeit versions flood black markets, but experienced engineers can always tell the difference.

    Resonium Kinetic Core (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A carefully synthesized chemical compound, its volatile reagents stabilized through proprietary processing techniques, crafted from Resonium and Hicenium Lattice. It is a key component in the fabrication of Jasphorus Crystals Extractor, Resonium Ore Extractor, Titan Scale Framework, and 1 other products. Shipyard foremen sleep easier knowing their supply manifest includes this item.

    Resonium Utility Matrix (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A radiation-hardened composite designed to maintain structural coherence even in the shadow of a supernova remnant, crafted from Resonium and Utility Matrix. It is a key component in the fabrication of Jasphorus Crystals Extractor, Resonium Ore Extractor, Storage Platform Core, and 1 other products. A testament to the ingenuity of galactic metallurgy and material science.

    Smelted from ores harvested across multiple star systems, blending elemental properties impossible to replicate from a single source, crafted from Utility Core and Vanadium Alloy.     A bio-synthetic hybrid material whose organic filaments self-repair under stress, extending operational lifespan indefinitely, crafted from Topaz Crystals. It is a key component in the fabrication of Power Coupling. It hums faintly when exposed to strong magnetic fields, a quirk that helps inspectors verify authenticity.

It is a key component in the fabrication of Weapon Targeting Core, Opal Womp. Its consistent performance across wildly different environments speaks to extraordinary engineering.

    Weapon Catalyst (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Its surface shimmers with an iridescent quality — a side effect of quantum interference patterns locked into its crystalline structure, crafted from Rochinol and Peridot Crystals. It is a key component in the fabrication of Propulsion Unit. It hums faintly when exposed to strong magnetic fields, a quirk that helps inspectors verify authenticity.

    Weapon Frame (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Nano-engineered to specifications so exact that even a single misplaced atom would compromise its function, crafted from Hafnium and Manganese. It is a key component in the fabrication of Weapon Housing. Sought after by manufacturers across all three factions for its reliability.

    Weapon Synchronization Matrix (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A bio-synthetic hybrid material whose organic filaments self-repair under stress, extending operational lifespan indefinitely, crafted from Fusion Weapon Core, Jasphorus Weapon Matrix, Quantum Weapon Core, and Strontium Weapon Core. It is a key component in the fabrication of Launch Platform Core, Weapon Synchronization Core. Its quality determines the performance ceiling of everything built from it.

    Weapon Targeting Core (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    A precision-cut crystalline assembly whose facets refract energy along calculated vectors, crafted from Weapon Amplifier and Advanced Weapon Frame. It is a key component in the fabrication of Launch Platform Core, Target Coordination System. Pirates have been known to raid freighters specifically targeting shipments of this component.

    Winch Mechanism (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A propulsion engineering component that converts raw energy into controlled thrust with minimal waste heat, crafted from Rhenium and Neodymium Magnets. It is a key component in the fabrication of Tow Assembly. Indispensable to the supply chains that keep Galia's economy turning.

    Zinc (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A refined metallic element, smelted from raw Zinc Ore in high-temperature orbital foundries, crafted from Zinc Ore. It is a key component in the fabrication of Tin Processor, Arco Extractor, Biomass Extractor, and 2 other products. Station markets list it among the top twenty most-traded industrial goods in the Expanse.

    Zirconium (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    A refined metallic element, smelted from raw Zirconium Ore in high-temperature orbital foundries, crafted from Zirconium Ore. It is a key component in the fabrication of Germanium Ore Extractor, Zirconium Ore Extractor, Kinetic Stabilizer Core, and 2 other products. The blueprints for its creation are tattooed into the tradition of the galaxy's oldest engineering guilds.

    Zirconium Control Hub (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    A classified alloy whose exact composition is a closely guarded trade secret among the faction's top metallurgists, crafted from Zirconium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Assembly Control Matrix, Capacity Control Core, Navigation Control Core, and 1 other products. Recycling this component is almost as complex as fabricating it — every atom was placed with intent.

    Zirconium Framework (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    Smelted from ores harvested across multiple star systems, blending elemental properties impossible to replicate from a single source, crafted from Zirconium. It is a key component in the fabrication of Germanium Ore Extractor, Mega Framework Core, Structural Control Array. Scarcity of this component has, on more than one occasion, delayed entire fleet deployments.

    🔩 Ingredients (Intermediate Assemblies)¶

    149 unique items

    Absorption Matrix (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A propulsion subsystem component, vibrating with contained kinetic potential, assembled from Crystal Matrix, Reactive Coating, and Energy Absorption Core. Integrated into the production of Negative Rem Plating CAP T1, Negative Rem Plating CAP T2, Negative Rem Plating CAP T3 and 2 other systems. The molecular signature of each unit is registered in central databases for traceability.

    Access Control (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A gravitational compensation module that maintains equipment calibration through acceleration changes, assembled from Security Lock, Resin Sealant, Sensor Elements, and Electronics. Integrated into the production of Ammunition Control Matrix, Processing Control Matrix, Storage Management System and 2 other systems. Fleet commissioning officers verify its presence before signing off on combat readiness.

    Advanced Control Matrix (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    A detection and tracking subassembly that extends a vessel's awareness deep into the void, assembled from Control System Core, Sensor Coordination Hub, Emp Protection Matrix, Processing Control Matrix, and Energy Substrate. Integrated into the production of Calico XPL, Fimbul ECOS Spybot, Titan Processing Core and 2 other systems. Its failure cascades through connected systems within seconds — redundancy protocols always include spares.

    Advanced Defense Matrix (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    An industrial containment system built to secure volatile materials under extreme conditions, assembled from Defense Coordination Core, Defense Integration System, Radiation Absorber, and Emp Protection Matrix. Integrated into the production of Decoy CAP T1, Decoy CAP T2, Decoy CAP T3 and 2 other systems. Assembly technicians handle it with practiced care — its tolerances leave no room for error.

    Advanced Power Grid (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    An environmental processing subsystem that maintains habitable conditions even in the most hostile environments, assembled from Power Management Core, Energy Coordination System, Capacitor Control Matrix, Power Distribution Network, and Energy Substrate. Integrated into the production of Titan Energy Network, Power Core CAP T1, Power Core CAP T2 and 2 other systems. Demand for this component surges predictably before major fleet engagements across the Expanse.

    Ammo Feed System (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A detection and tracking subassembly that extends a vessel's awareness deep into the void, assembled from Alloy Frame, Plastic Components, and Copper. Integrated into the production of Pearce Hulltank, Ammo CAP T1, Ammo CAP T2 and 2 other systems. Advanced manufacturing AI monitors every stage of its production to guarantee consistent output.

    Ammunition Control Matrix (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    An advanced computational module, its quantum-etched pathways processing millions of calculations per cycle, assembled from Ammo Control Core, Detonation Matrix, and Access Control. Integrated into the production of Fire Control Matrix, Launch Coordination Matrix, Weapon Synchronization Core and 2 other systems. Its blueprints are closely guarded by the engineering guilds that perfected its design.

    Architectural Framework (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A resource distribution subsystem engineered for zero-loss transfer under operational pressures, assembled from Titan Scale Framework, Megastructure Support System, Structural Reinforcement Grid, Megastructural Framework, and Thermal Management System. Integrated into the production of Hab Cargo Storage T5. Experienced mechanics can feel through their gloves whether the calibration is within tolerance.

    Armor Plating (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A multi-spectral focusing array that channels energy across several wavelengths simultaneously, assembled from Heavy Alloy and Zinc. Integrated into the production of Hull Reinforcement CAP T1, Hull Reinforcement CAP T2, Hull Reinforcement CAP T3 and 2 other systems. Journeyman engineers earn their accreditation precisely by demonstrating mastery of this assembly's integration.

    Assembly Integration Matrix (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A multi-spectral focusing array that channels energy across several wavelengths simultaneously, assembled from Assembly Control Matrix, Processing Control Matrix, Multi System Coordinator, Deployment Control System, and Resource Processing Hub. Integrated into the production of Titan Processing Platform, Emp CLASS8 T1, Emp CLASS8 T2 and 2 other systems. Without this piece, the larger assemblies it feeds into would remain incomplete abstractions.

    Beam Control Interface (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    A stabilization engineering module that tames chaotic forces into controlled output, assembled from Beam Interface Core, Extraction Beam, and Power Coupling. Integrated into the production of Navigation Coordination Hub, Tractor Beam CAP T1, Tractor Beam CAP T2 and 2 other systems. Failure analysis reports cite this component less often than almost any peer-class assembly.

    A photonic relay hub that converts electrical signals to light pulses for interference-free transmission, assembled from Optical Components, Copper Wire, Lumanite, and Graphene.     🤖 Drones¶

    19 unique items

    Armstrong IMP Tink (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Armstrong, this micro-repair drone that welds fractures and patches breaches with mechanical precision no human hand could match. Assembled from Drone Controller, Mining Controller, Extraction Beam, Material Processor, and Industrial Control Matrix. Pilots who've served alongside these drones speak of an almost uncanny operational intuition.

    Armstrong IMP Tote (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Armstrong, this utility cargo drone optimized for hauling materials between facilities and ships with zero-error logistics. Assembled from Drone Controller, Cargo Container, Propulsion Core, Navigation Coordination Hub, and Capacity Management System. Its modular hardpoint system accepts a wider range of payloads than most competing platforms.

    Busan Dust Draw (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Busan, this automated resource collection drone, designed to harvest and transport raw materials with tireless efficiency. Assembled from Drone Controller, Material Processor, Industrial Control Matrix, Absorption Matrix, Suppression System, and Drywater. A familiar sight in the drone bays of experienced fleet commanders.

    Calico Medrone (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Calico, this autonomous repair and maintenance drone, capable of performing hull restoration and emergency repairs in active combat zones. Assembled from Drone Controller, Repair Nanobots, Bio Monitor, Life Support Core, Service Coordination Hub, and Drywater. Its autonomous protocols have been battle-proven across Galia's most contested sectors.

    Calico XPL (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Calico, this long-range exploration drone equipped with multi-spectrum scanners for surveying uncharted planetary surfaces. Assembled from Drone Controller, Sensor Module, Advanced Control Matrix, Detection Matrix, and Signal Processor. Field reports consistently rank this platform among the top in its class for survivability.

    Fimbul ECOS Crybot (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Fimbul, this cryogenic operations drone specialized in cold-environment tasks, thermal containment, and cryo-extraction. Assembled from Drone Controller, Superchill Payload Kit, Cryogenic Core, Thermal Management System, Fire Control Matrix, and Drywater. Its neural network adapts to its operator's tactical preferences over time, becoming an extension of their will.

    Fimbul ECOS Spybot (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Fimbul, this reconnaissance drone outfitted with passive sensor arrays for covert intelligence gathering deep in hostile territory. Assembled from Drone Controller, Sensor Module, Advanced Control Matrix, Holographic Projector, Signal Mimicry, and Ink. Drone bay chiefs maintain these units with almost paternal devotion — they've earned it.

    Fimbul Naga (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Fimbul, this versatile multi-role drone platform adaptable to combat, reconnaissance, and utility configurations. Assembled from Drone Controller, Kinetic Payload Kit, Fire Control Matrix, Weapon Housing, and Explosive Payload Kit. Engineering crews compete informally over who can achieve the fastest turnaround between deployments.

    Fimbul Naga Pew (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Fimbul, this precision-strike combat drone that delivers focused energy bursts against hardened targets. Assembled from Drone Controller, Energy Payload Kit, Fire Control Matrix, Weapon Housing, and Charge Controller. The drone's low thermal signature makes it nearly invisible to passive detection arrays.

    Fimbul Scrapup (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Fimbul, this salvage-recovery drone that dismantles derelict structures and reclaims usable materials. Assembled from Drone Controller, Tow Assembly, Industrial Control Matrix, Extraction Beam, and Material Processor. Its self-diagnostic routines can identify and compensate for damage mid-operation.

    Fimbul Zap (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Fimbul, this close-support combat drone armed with rapid-fire energy emitters for suppressive engagement. Assembled from Drone Controller, Emp Payload Kit, Emp Matrix Core, Electromagnetic Resonator, Fire Control Matrix, and Drywater. After-action reports credit these drones with turning the tide in more engagements than any pilot cares to count.

    Opal Womp (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Opal, this electronic warfare drone projecting sensor-disrupting fields across wide engagement zones. Assembled from Drone Controller, Shockwave Payload Kit, Weapon Amplifier, Resonium Kinetic Core, Fire Control Matrix, and Ink. A familiar sight in the drone bays of experienced fleet commanders.

    Pearce D1 (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Pearce, this autonomous operational drone deployed from shipboard drone ports. Assembled from Drone Controller, Capacity Management System, Defense Coordination Node, Cargo Container, and Energy Storage Cell. Its sensor suite detects threats that human operators would miss entirely.

    Pearce Hulltank (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Pearce, this heavily armored defensive drone designed to absorb incoming fire and shield allied vessels. Assembled from Drone Controller, Kinetic Payload Kit, Ammo Feed System, Weapon Housing, and Fire Control Matrix. The characteristic whine of its engines has become a sound of relief for pinned-down crews.

    Pearce R1 (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Pearce, this autonomous operational drone deployed from shipboard drone ports. Assembled from Drone Controller, Emergency Beacon, Emergency Response Protocol, Service Coordination Hub, Radiation Shield, and Drywater. Its neural network adapts to its operator's tactical preferences over time, becoming an extension of their will.

    Pearce Shocktank (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Pearce, this assault drone built around a high-capacitance shock projector for devastating area-denial strikes. Assembled from Drone Controller, Energy Payload Kit, Fire Control Matrix, Weapon Housing, and Energy Storage Cell. Its modular hardpoint system accepts a wider range of payloads than most competing platforms.

    Rainbow Gu (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Rainbow, this micro-scale disruption drone that infiltrates enemy sensor networks and corrupts targeting data. Assembled from Drone Controller, Gray Goo Payload Kit, Living Metal Network, Matter Containment, Fire Control Matrix, and Ink. Its operational ceiling extends well beyond what its compact frame would suggest.

    Tufa Pyra (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by Tufa, this incendiary combat drone deploying thermal payloads that overwhelm enemy heat management systems. Assembled from Drone Controller, Heat Payload Kit, Heating Element, Plasma Cell, Fire Control Matrix, and Drywater. After-action reports credit these drones with turning the tide in more engagements than any pilot cares to count.

    VZUS fixif (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    Manufactured by VZUS, this precision engineering drone designed for in-field equipment calibration using micro-manipulator arrays. Assembled from Drone Controller, Repair Nanobots, Diagnostic Suite, Service Coordination Hub, Healing Protocol, and Ink. Its autonomous protocols have been battle-proven across Galia's most contested sectors.

    🏠 Habitat Assets¶

    21 unique items

    Hab Cargo Storage T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A habitat cargo storage module that expands the holding capacity of planetary bases, constructed from Cargo Container and Structural Foundation. Morale studies consistently show that quality habitat infrastructure correlates directly with crew retention.

    Hab Cargo Storage T2 (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A habitat cargo storage module that expands the holding capacity of planetary bases, constructed from Hab Cargo Storage T1, Cargo Container, Structural Foundation, and Safety Interlock. The first thing any seasoned base commander builds. Everything else depends on it.

    Hab Cargo Storage T3 (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    A habitat cargo storage module that expands the holding capacity of planetary bases, constructed from Hab Cargo Storage T2, Cargo Container, Structural Foundation, Safety Interlock, and Storage Coordination System. Its power-efficient design draws minimal energy from the base grid while maximizing utility.

    Hab Cargo Storage T4 (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    A habitat cargo storage module that expands the holding capacity of planetary bases, constructed from Hab Cargo Storage T3, Cargo Container, Structural Foundation, Safety Interlock, Storage Coordination System, and Structural Reinforcement Grid. Crews vote with their feet — bases with better facilities attract better talent.

    Hab Cargo Storage T5 (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A habitat cargo storage module that expands the holding capacity of planetary bases, constructed from Hab Cargo Storage T4, Cargo Container, Structural Foundation, Safety Interlock, Storage Coordination System, Structural Reinforcement Grid, and Architectural Framework. Construction crews can assemble this module in hours, a testament to standardized engineering.

    Hab Crafting Station M (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A M-class habitat crafting station enabling on-site manufacturing within planetary bases, assembled from Hab Crafting Station S, Material Processor, Industrial Control Matrix, Safety Interlock, Structural Foundation, and Structural Reinforcement Grid. Construction crews can assemble this module in hours, a testament to standardized engineering.

    Hab Crafting Station S (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A S-class habitat crafting station enabling on-site manufacturing within planetary bases, assembled from Hab Crafting Station Xs, Material Processor, Industrial Control Matrix, Safety Interlock, and Structural Foundation. Every module added to a base brings it one step closer to true self-sufficiency.

    Hab Crafting Station XS (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A XS-class habitat crafting station enabling on-site manufacturing within planetary bases, assembled from Hab Crafting Station Xxs, Material Processor, Industrial Control Matrix, and Safety Interlock. Every commander knows that logistics wins wars — and infrastructure wins logistics.

    Hab Crafting Station XXS (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A XXS-class habitat crafting station enabling on-site manufacturing within planetary bases, assembled from Material Processor and Industrial Control Matrix. The first thing any seasoned base commander builds. Everything else depends on it.

    Hab Exterior Paint (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Specialized exterior hull coating for habitat customization, crafted from Material Processor and Protective Layer. The first thing any seasoned base commander builds. Everything else depends on it.

    Hab Interior Paint (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Specialized interior coating for habitat customization, crafted from Material Processor and Environmental Control. The warm glow of its interior lighting is visible from orbit — a beacon of civilization in the wilderness.

    Hab Landing Pad M (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A M-class landing pad providing docking facilities for ships at planetary bases, constructed from Hab Landing Pad S, Structural Foundation, Docking Clamp, Safety Interlock, Fuel Storage Tank, and Structural Reinforcement Grid. Its guidance beacons cut through atmospheric interference, guiding pilots safely to the surface.

    Hab Landing Pad S (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A S-class landing pad providing docking facilities for ships at planetary bases, constructed from Hab Landing Pad Xs, Structural Foundation, Docking Clamp, Safety Interlock, and Fuel Storage Tank. Construction crews can assemble this module in hours, a testament to standardized engineering.

    Hab Landing Pad XS (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A XS-class landing pad providing docking facilities for ships at planetary bases, constructed from Hab Landing Pad Xxs, Structural Foundation, Docking Clamp, and Safety Interlock. Every module added to a base brings it one step closer to true self-sufficiency.

    Hab Landing Pad XXS (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A XXS-class landing pad providing docking facilities for ships at planetary bases, constructed from Structural Foundation and Docking Clamp. In the vastness of space, even small touches of personalization remind crew that a base is more than metal — it's home.

    Hab Pet House (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A companion habitat module providing shelter and enrichment for onboard pets and biological companions, crafted from Habitat Module and Environmental Control. Its environmental seals maintain positive pressure even during the worst dust storms.

    Hab T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    A habitat module serving as foundational living quarters for planetary base operations, constructed from Habitat Module and Environmental Control. It transforms barren rock into a place worth defending. The warm glow of its interior lighting is visible from orbit — a beacon of civilization in the wilderness.

    Hab T2 (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    A habitat module serving as foundational living quarters for planetary base operations, constructed from Hab T1, Habitat Module, Environmental Control, and Safety Interlock. It transforms barren rock into a place worth defending. Every commander knows that logistics wins wars — and infrastructure wins logistics.

    Hab T3 (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    A habitat module serving as foundational living quarters for planetary base operations, constructed from Hab T2, Habitat Module, Environmental Control, Safety Interlock, Life Support Coordination, and Drywater. It transforms barren rock into a place worth defending. Its environmental seals maintain positive pressure even during the worst dust storms.

    Hab T4 (Tier 4, Epic)¶

    A habitat module serving as foundational living quarters for planetary base operations, constructed from Hab T3, Habitat Module, Environmental Control, Safety Interlock, Life Support Coordination, Structural Reinforcement Grid, and Drywater. It transforms barren rock into a place worth defending. Its power-efficient design draws minimal energy from the base grid while maximizing utility.

    Hab T5 (Tier 5, Legendary)¶

    A habitat module serving as foundational living quarters for planetary base operations, constructed from Hab T4, Habitat Module, Environmental Control, Safety Interlock, Life Support Coordination, Structural Reinforcement Grid, and Drywater. It transforms barren rock into a place worth defending. The difference between a camp and a colony is the quality of its permanent structures.

    ⚔️ Ship Weapons¶

    1200 unique items

    Emp Beam CAP T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this directed energy weapon system is forged from Emp Payload Kit, Beam Focusing Array, Power Regulation Module, Thermal Management System, and Fire Control Matrix. Its modular barrel assembly can be swapped between configurations in under fifteen minutes.

    Emp Beam CAP T2 (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this directed energy weapon system is forged from Emp Beam Cap T1, Emp Payload Kit, Beam Focusing Array, Power Regulation Module, Thermal Management System, and Fire Control Matrix. Its modular barrel assembly can be swapped between configurations in under fifteen minutes.

    Emp Beam CAP T3 (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this directed energy weapon system is forged from Emp Beam Cap T2, Emp Payload Kit, Beam Focusing Array, Power Regulation Module, Thermal Management System, and Fire Control Matrix. Its recoil compensation system is so refined that operators barely notice the weapon firing.

    Emp Beam CAP T4 (Tier 4, Epic, MUD | USTUR only)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this directed energy weapon system is forged from Emp Beam Cap T3, Emp Payload Kit, Beam Focusing Array, Power Regulation Module, Thermal Management System, and Fire Control Matrix. Its electromagnetic shielding prevents enemy ECM from disrupting targeting at critical moments.

    180 unique items

    Ammo CAP T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this specialized system component is forged from Cargo Container, Ammo Feed System, Safety Interlock, Ammunition Control Matrix, and Capacity Management System. Engineering logs consistently credit this module with extending hull life beyond projections.

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this specialized system component is forged from Ammo Cap T1, Cargo Container, Ammo Feed System, Safety Interlock, Ammunition Control Matrix, and Capacity Management System.     🎯 Countermeasures¶

    450 unique items

    Decoy CAP T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this electronic countermeasure system generates false sensor signatures sophisticated enough to mislead even advanced targeting AI. Forged from Holographic Projector, Signal Mimicry, Power Coupling, Defense Integration System, and Advanced Defense Matrix. Fleet doctrine mandates this system be armed and ready before entering any contested zone.

    Flare CAP T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this thermal countermeasure launcher deploys searing heat signatures to divert incoming guided missiles from their true target.     🚀 Missiles¶

    350 unique items

    Emp CAP T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this EMP-warhead guided missile disables enemy electronic systems on impact, leaving vessels dark and defenseless. Assembled from Emp Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, and Target Coordination System. Its warhead detonation sequence is calibrated for maximum structural disruption.

    Emp CAP T2 (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this EMP-warhead guided missile disables enemy electronic systems on impact, leaving vessels dark and defenseless. Assembled from Emp Cap T1, Emp Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, and Target Coordination System. Once locked on, few targets survive the closing seconds before impact.

    Emp CAP T3 (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this EMP-warhead guided missile disables enemy electronic systems on impact, leaving vessels dark and defenseless. Assembled from Emp Cap T2, Emp Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, and Target Coordination System. Ammunition officers maintain strict inventory protocols — every unit is accounted for at all times.

    Emp CAP T4 (Tier 4, Epic, MUD | USTUR only)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this EMP-warhead guided missile disables enemy electronic systems on impact, leaving vessels dark and defenseless. Assembled from Emp Cap T3, Emp Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, and Target Coordination System. The missile's terminal guidance phase adjusts trajectory thousands of times per second.

    Emp CAP T5 (Tier 5, Legendary, USTUR only)¶

    Engineered for Capital-class vessels, this EMP-warhead guided missile disables enemy electronic systems on impact, leaving vessels dark and defenseless. Assembled from Emp Cap T4, Emp Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, and Target Coordination System. Fleet admirals measure deterrence in the number of these ordnance racks visible on their vessels.

    Emp CLASS8 T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    This EMP-warhead guided missile disables enemy electronic systems on impact, leaving vessels dark and defenseless. Assembled from Emp Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, Target Coordination System, and Assembly Integration Matrix. The satisfying click of a successful lock-on has been described as the most reassuring sound in combat.

    Emp CLASS8 T2 (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    This EMP-warhead guided missile disables enemy electronic systems on impact, leaving vessels dark and defenseless. Assembled from Emp Class8 T1, Emp Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, Target Coordination System, and Assembly Integration Matrix. Ordnance techs treat these with the careful respect due to any object capable of cracking a hull.

    Emp CLASS8 T3 (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    This EMP-warhead guided missile disables enemy electronic systems on impact, leaving vessels dark and defenseless. Assembled from Emp Class8 T2, Emp Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, Target Coordination System, and Assembly Integration Matrix. The satisfying click of a successful lock-on has been described as the most reassuring sound in combat.

    Emp CLASS8 T4 (Tier 4, Epic, MUD | USTUR only)¶

    This EMP-warhead guided missile disables enemy electronic systems on impact, leaving vessels dark and defenseless. Assembled from Emp Class8 T3, Emp Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, Target Coordination System, and Assembly Integration Matrix. The missile's terminal guidance phase adjusts trajectory thousands of times per second.

Assembled from Superchill Ttn T1, Superchill Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, Target Coordination System, and Assembly Integration Matrix. Missile doctrine across Galia continues to evolve, but the principle remains: strike hard, strike first.

    Superchill TTN T3 (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    Engineered for Titan-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Ttn T2, Superchill Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, Target Coordination System, and Assembly Integration Matrix. Its blast radius is precisely calculated to maximize damage while minimizing debris risk to friendly craft.

    Superchill TTN T4 (Tier 4, Epic, MUD | USTUR only)¶

    Engineered for Titan-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Ttn T3, Superchill Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, Target Coordination System, and Assembly Integration Matrix. Ordnance techs treat these with the careful respect due to any object capable of cracking a hull.

    Superchill TTN T5 (Tier 5, Legendary, USTUR only)¶

    Engineered for Titan-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Ttn T4, Superchill Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, Propulsion Unit, Power Distribution Network, Target Coordination System, and Assembly Integration Matrix. Its propulsion system achieves acceleration rates that make evasion mathematically improbable.

    Superchill XS T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Engineered for XS-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, and Propulsion Unit. Its blast radius is precisely calculated to maximize damage while minimizing debris risk to friendly craft.

    Superchill XS T2 (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Engineered for XS-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Xs T1, Superchill Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, and Propulsion Unit. Its blast radius is precisely calculated to maximize damage while minimizing debris risk to friendly craft.

    Superchill XS T3 (Tier 3, Rare)¶

    Engineered for XS-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Xs T2, Superchill Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, and Propulsion Unit. Its warhead detonation sequence is calibrated for maximum structural disruption.

    Superchill XS T4 (Tier 4, Epic, MUD | USTUR only)¶

    Engineered for XS-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Xs T3, Superchill Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, and Propulsion Unit. The faint contrail it leaves across the void is the last thing many captains ever see.

    Superchill XS T5 (Tier 5, Legendary, USTUR only)¶

    Engineered for XS-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Xs T4, Superchill Payload Kit, Missile Guidance Core, and Propulsion Unit. Its blast radius is precisely calculated to maximize damage while minimizing debris risk to friendly craft.

    Superchill XXS T1 (Tier 1, Common)¶

    Engineered for XXS-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Payload Kit and Missile Guidance Core. The missile's terminal guidance phase adjusts trajectory thousands of times per second.

    Superchill XXS T2 (Tier 2, Uncommon)¶

    Engineered for XXS-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Xxs T1, Superchill Payload Kit, and Missile Guidance Core. Its warhead detonation sequence is calibrated for maximum structural disruption.

    Engineered for XXS-class vessels, this guided missile ordnance is engineered for decisive ship-to-ship combat engagement. Assembled from Superchill Xxs T2, Superchill Payload Kit, and Missile Guidance Core. The satisfying click of a successful lock-on has been described as the most reassuring sound in combat.

    Abyssal Energy Crystals Extractor (Tier 1, Common)¶
